goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should 'arrive by 08:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'queens' college'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type', 'entrance fee', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should leave on saturday and should arrive by 08:00
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called queens' college
Make sure you get attraction type, entrance fee, and postcode
